verbGlossary.MOBILIZES: {source} brings {target} or worker on-site for the duration of project work at that area
verbGlossary.STATIONS: {source} is the permanent post for a safety or supervisory {target} throughout the project
verbGlossary.RIGS AT: Heavy lift {target} is erected and anchored at a specific site or staging position
verbGlossary.STAGES: {source} or {target}s are pre-positioned in a laydown area or exterior zone before installation
verbGlossary.STOCKPILES: Bulk {target}s are stored at a staging area or site location awaiting distribution to work areas
verbGlossary.HOUSES: {source} envelope contains and shelters {target}s working inside it
verbGlossary.RECEIVES: {source} accepts inbound {target}s delivered for installation within that area
verbGlossary.COMPACTS WITH: {source} is densified to specification using compaction {target}
verbGlossary.POWERS: {source}is served by temporary utility connections for power, water, or heat
verbGlossary.ROUTES: Right-of-way corridor directs hauling {target} along a defined path to and from the site
verbGlossary.POURS WITH: {source} or below-grade level receives cast-in-place concrete placed by concrete {target}s
verbGlossary.ROUGHS IN: {source} level receives first-fix mechanical or electrical distribution installed by {target}
verbGlossary.FRAMES WITH: {source} level receives metal stud or wood framing erected by the drywall or carpentry {target}
verbGlossary.PLACES: {source} level receives reinforcing steel or concrete deposited in its final structural position
verbGlossary.INSTALLS: {source} receives {target} or assembly permanently fixed in place
verbGlossary.LIFTS WITH: {source} level uses access {target} such as scissor lifts or scaffolding to reach overhead work
verbGlossary.SEALS WITH: {source} is made watertight or firestopped by a specialty {target}
verbGlossary.DRIVES WITH: {source} receives deep foundation elements installed by piling {target}
verbGlossary.APPLIES: {source} receives a liquid or sheet membrane waterproofing application
verbGlossary.DECKS WITH: {source}level receives roofing system installed by the roofing {target}
verbGlossary.INSPECTS WITH: {source} or wing is walked by QC inspector to verify workmanship against specifications
verbGlossary.INSTALLS IN: {source}receives a vertical system such as an elevator cab installed by {target}
verbGlossary.RISERS IN: {source}receives vertical fire protection piping run by sprinkler fitters
verbGlossary.RUNS DUCT IN: {source} receives HVAC ductwork fabricated and hung by the sheet metal {target}
verbGlossary.PULLS CABLE IN: {source} receives low voltage or data cabling pulled by the low voltage {target}
verbGlossary.WRAPS IN: {source} receives insulation applied by the insulation {target}
verbGlossary.GRIDS WITH: {source} or space receives suspended ceiling grid and tile installed by the ceiling {target}
verbGlossary.LAYS: {source} receives flooring {target} laid and adhered to the substrate
verbGlossary.FIXTURES WITH: {source} receives lighting {target}s trimmed out and connected
verbGlossary.HANGS: {source} receives doors hung in their frames with specified hardware
verbGlossary.SERVES: {source}area is conditioned by HVAC {target} sized and ducted to serve that space
verbGlossary.TRIMS WITH: {source}area receives finish plumbing trim including faucets, {target}s, and drains installed by plumbers
verbGlossary.PIPES WITH: {source}area receives plumbing {target} and waste piping rough-in
verbGlossary.LAYS WITH: {source}receives masonry units laid by masons in courses to design height
verbGlossary.GLAZES WITH: {source}receives glass panels or curtain wall units installed by glaziers
verbGlossary.CURTAINS WITH: {source}receives glass and aluminum curtain wall assembly
verbGlossary.COMMISSIONS AT: {source} location undergoes functional testing led by the commissioning agent
verbGlossary.FIRESTOPS WITH: {source}receives rated fire-stop {target} packed and sealed to specification
verbGlossary.SAFEGUARDS WITH: {source} is lined with fire protection {target}s to maintain its rated barrier
verbGlossary.DEPLOYS: {source} area directs {target} labor to active installation areas for the current work window
verbGlossary.LAYS OUT WITH: {source} line intersection is established on the deck using survey instruments
verbGlossary.QUANTIFIED BY: {source}-based standard measure is calculated using data from {target} record
